name: Buttermilk Chocolate Cake W/Coconutpecan---pt 1
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Sweet German cooking chocolate - broken into 4 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter three 8-inch cake pans thoroughly and line the base of each with baking parchment. Rub a little more butter onto the paper.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. See Part 2 for continued instructions.
